translations:
bleib
			doch noch hier, wir müssen noch unser Leinen waschen

30.	Maṭi
			lәGziro, kalayo Sətyá Zīn w aǧ+ǧeriyayḏa kulle ʕali+ʕayno,
			d̥koquṣri  aǧ+ǧule, mašiġi aǧ+ǧule.

He
			reached Gziro. Setya Zin and her maids are all at the spring
			fulling clothes. (Mamo w Zine)

Preterit.turoyo: Yaʕni mʕawanno-wo ġalabe, u ʕamo ġalabe. U mede, d uṯe-wo meni, bi qabəliyayḏi, lə mqaṣarli qəm nošo
translations:
I helped a lot, (helped) people a lot. Anything, that I could,
			that was in my power, I did not neglect (to do)
